IExceptionService Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The IExceptionService type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
GetExceptionConfig
Returns the HTTP configuration to apply for this exception.
GetExceptions
Returns all relevant exceptions in the chain for the given exception.
LogException
ToExceptionData
Returns serializable exception data for the given exceptions.
